answers: Edge computing = processing data near the source instead of sending to cloud. Faster response, less bandwidth, better privacy.
Edge vs cloud: edge processes locally (fast, real-time), cloud processes remotely (powerful, scalable). Many use both together.
Examples: self-driving cars, factory robots, smart cameras, IoT sensors — all need instant decisions without cloud delay.
Edge computing is growing with IoT and 5G. Key benefit: millisecond response times critical for autonomous vehicles, healthcare, gaming.
